title: Lambdas that capture this should capture everything explicitly
description: A lambda can only capture local variables. When a lambda is defined within a member function, you may believe that you are capturing a member variable of the current class, but in fact, what you are capturing is this. This may be very surprising, and lead to bugs if the lambda is then used after the current object has been destroyed.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Lambda that captures member variables should explicitly capture 'this' or capture everything
